title: ilex opaca var. opaca
intro: Ilex opaca var. opaca, also known as the American holly, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex opaca var. opaca include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and act as an antiviral agent. The herbal preparations of Ilex opaca var. opaca typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
